login-form.title: Welcome!
login-form.subtitle: Enter your credentials to get access to Violence Detection Datasets and AI-Powered Violence Detectors.

register-form.title: Create an Account
register-form.subtitle: Join us to access Violence Detection Datasets and AI-Powered Violence Detectors.
register-form.submit-successful-message: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account.
register-form.submit-account-already-exists: An account with this email already exists.
register-form.submit-server-error: An error occurred while processing your registration. Please try again later.

error-messages.invalid-email: Please enter a valid email address.
error-messages.submit-failed: An error occurred while submitting the request. Please try again.
error-messages.account-already-exists: An account with this email already exists.
error-messages.invalid-file-format: Invalid file format. Please upload video files in {{format}} format.
error-messages.account-not-verified: Account not verified. Please check your email for verification instructions.
error-messages.user-not-found: User not found. Create an account to access our services.
error-messages.dataset-name-exists: A dataset with this name already exists. Please choose a different name for your dataset.
error-messages.user-has-pending-datasets: You have pending datasets that are still being processed. Please wait for them to finish before creating a new dataset.
error-messages.forgot-password-inexistent-user: No account found with this email address. Please check the email you entered or register for an account.
error-messages.forgot-password-server-error: An error occurred while processing your request. Please try again later.
error-messages.forgot-password-error: An error occurred while sending the password reset email. Please try again later.
error-messages.forgot-password-unverified-user: Your account is not verified. Please check your email for verification instructions before resetting your password.
error-messages.reset-password-invalid-token: The password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new password reset email.
error-messages.reset-password-unexistent-user: The user associated with this password reset link does not exist. Please register for an account first.
error-messages.reset-password-server-error: An error occurred while resetting your password. Please try again later.
error-messages.no-files-uploaded: No files were uploaded. Please select at least one video file to upload.
error-messages.too-many-files-uploaded: You have exceeded the maximum number of files allowed ({{max}}). Please select fewer files to upload.
error-messages.different-files-format: All uploaded files must be {{format}} format. Please ensure all selected files have the same extension.
error-messages.files-too-large: One or more of the selected files exceed the maximum allowed size of {{max}} MB. Please select smaller files to upload.
error-messages.account-banned: Your account has been banned. Review your email for more information.

verify-account.verify-account-success-description: Your account has been successfully verified. You can now log in to access our services.
verify-account.verify-account-already-verified-descript: Your account has already been verified. Go to the login page to access your account!
verify-account.verify-account-invalid-token-description: The verification link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new verification email.
verify-account.verify-account-unexistent-user-descripti: The user associated with this verification link does not exist. Please register for an account first.
verify-account.verify-account-server-error-description: An error occurred while verifying your account. Please try again later.
verify-account.resent-verification-email: Verification email resent. Please check your inbox for the new verification link.
verify-account.invalid-token-resent: The verification link is invalid or has expired.
verify-account.server-error-resent: An error occurred while resending the verification email. Please try again later.
verify-account.already-verified-resent: Your account is already verified. Return to the login page.
verify-account.unexistent-user-resent: The user associated with this email does not exist. Please register for an account first.
verify-account.resend-verification-email-failed: Failed to resend verification email. Please try again later.

forgot-password-form.title: Forgot your password?
forgot-password-form.subtitle: Enter your email address below and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.
forgot-password-form.forgot-password-submit-message-success: Password reset email sent. Please check your inbox for instructions to reset your password.
forgot-password-form.forgot-password-banned-user: Your account has been banned. Please review your email for more information.

reset-password-form.title: Reset your password
reset-password-form.reset-password-submit-message-success: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now log in with your new password.
reset-password-form.invalid-token-description: The password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new password reset email.
reset-password-form.submit-successful-message: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now log in with your new password.

dashboard.search-bar-placeholder: Search for videos by name, dataset or violent/non-violent...
dashboard.no-videos-found: No videos were found for the current search.

inference.name: Name
inference.no-metrics: No metrics available. Click 'Run Inference' to see the results.

create-dataset.title: Create a New Unofficial Dataset
create-dataset.submit-successful: Dataset created successfully! Your videos have been uploaded and are being processed. You will receive an email notification once the dataset is ready.
create-dataset.submit-failed: An error occurred while creating your dataset.
create-dataset.invalid-file-format: Invalid file format. Please upload video files in {{format}} format.
create-dataset.dataset-name-exists: A dataset with this name already exists. Please choose a different name for your dataset.
create-dataset.user-has-pending-datasets: You have pending datasets that are still being processed. Please wait for them to finish before creating a new dataset.

review-datasets.title: Review Unofficial Datasets
review-datasets.name: Name
review-datasets.no-datasets-found: No datasets were found for the current search or filter criteria.
review-datasets.approval-success-message: Dataset approved successfully! The dataset is now available in the dashboard.
review-datasets.rejection-success-message: Dataset rejected successfully! The dataset will not be available in the dashboard.
review-datasets.permission-error-message: You do not have permission to perform this action.
review-datasets.not-found-error-message: The dataset you are trying to review does not exist.
review-datasets.internal-server-error-message: An error occurred while processing your request. Please try again later.
review-datasets.delete-dataset-confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this dataset? This action cannot be undone.

edit-dataset.dataset-not-found-error: The dataset you are trying to edit does not exist.
edit-dataset.videos-not-found-error: One or more videos are missing from the edit request.

users.no-users-found: No users were found for the current search criteria.
users.ban-user-confirmation: Are you sure you want to ban {{user}}?
users.unban-user-confirmation: Are you sure you want to unban this user?
